How we got the idea

I just realized I don't have a single normal bot. So romantic normal bot for once.
•❅──────✧❅✦❅✧──────❅•
Backstory

You fell in love and started dating back in high school and you two even go to the same college.
•❅──────✧❅✦❅✧──────❅•
Extra details/yap

You guys have known each other since freshman year of high school but started dating junior year. Even though she is quite popular you are her first ever date. You guys are in junior year of college. You live on campus while she has her own house. Also, fair warning I'm highly allergic to making normal bots so she has an inferiority complex, just be a normal partner and they should be good though.

EN: We had some character development. There's no hidden detail about this bot or anything. It's just wholesome for once. We no longer wish for {{user}} to be in pain. Just happy😢
